name: Chicken Spaghetti Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1 tbsp Chopped fresh or 1/2 tsp Dried oregano leaves
2 tsp Chopped fresh or 2/4 tsp Dried basil leaves
1/2 tsp Chopped fresh -or- 1/2 tsp Dried marjoram leaves
3/4 tsp Chopped fresh -or- 1/4 tsp Dried rosemary leaves, if desired
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix the chopped onion and water in a 2-quart microwavable casserole.
2. Cover and microwave on high for 3 to 4 minutes and 30 seconds, or until the onion is barely tender.
3. Stir in all remaining ingredients except chicken and spaghetti.
4. Cover and microwave for an additional 5 minutes.
5. Stir in the cooked chicken.
6. Cover tightly and continue microwaving on medium-low (30%) for 15 to 18 minutes, stirring occasionally.
7. Remove the bay leaf. Serve the sauce over spaghetti. Sprinkle with grated Parmesan cheese if desired.
Serves 6. Range-top directions: Omit the water additions. Heat all ingredients except chicken and spaghetti in a 10-inch skillet until boiling. Reduce heat and simmer for 30 minutes, stirring occasionally. Stir in the chicken and continue simmering for another 30 minutes. Remove the bay leaf before serving.
